name: Hyperstack Z-Projection and Temporal Profiling
description: You are a cell biologist analyzing a 5D confocal movie of a dividing cell. Process the 'Mitosis' sample image to produce a 2D time-lapse video of the chromosomes (Channel 1/Red) using Maximum Intensity Z-Projection across all time frames. Save the resulting time-lapse to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/chromosomes_timelapse.tif. Quantify the Mean Gray Value of the entire image for every time frame and save the measurements to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/intensity_trace.csv. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
